creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to Miyashita Touka from comment #12)
Hi Miyashita,
With aslr enabled, lang/go14 builds go14-1.4.3_6 nicely on both i386 and amd64, running FreeBSD 12.1-STABLE #22 r353671M; with:
kern.elf64.aslr.stack_gap=1
kern.elf64.aslr.honor_sbrk=1
kern.elf64.aslr.pie_enable=1
kern.elf64.aslr.enable=1
kern.elf64.pie_base=16912384
kern.elf64.nxstack=1
kern.elf64.fallback_brand=-1
kern.elf32.aslr.stack_gap=1
kern.elf32.aslr.honor_sbrk=1
kern.elf32.aslr.pie_enable=1
kern.elf32.aslr.enable=1
kern.elf32.pie_base=16781312
kern.elf32.read_exec=0
kern.elf32.nxstack=1
kern.elf32.fallback_brand=-1
vm.cluster_anon=1
